name: Ginger Mustard Chicken Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chicken by skinning, boning, and splitting.
2. Mix flour, salt, and pepper on a plate. Lightly coat chicken with seasoned flour.
3. Heat butter in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add chicken and sauté, turning once, until cooked through (8-10 minutes). Remove to a serving plate and keep warm.
4. Pour broth into the skillet and increase heat to boiling. Scrape loose browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
5. Add ginger and cook, stirring frequently, for 2 minutes.
6. Stir in mustards and scallions. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Spoon sauce over chicken and serve hot.
